violations.text: The ice scoop is stored on an unclean surface (top of the ice machine) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the sandwich prep unit and the pizza prep unit. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/21/2025
The hood screens were observed with an excess of debris. Hood systems must be maintained. New Violation. Correct By: 08/21/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, Ice wand) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024

The three bay sink in the back was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. The sanitize side of the three bay sink, is failing to to fill, because of a leak. Establishment is using a bucket in bottom of three bay to hold sanitizer until repair is made. Correct by - 6/25/24 Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the prep unit, two door and low boy. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quat sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2024
The ceiling tiles through out the establishment are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer, and knives on knife rack) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicers and knives are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The non-food contact surfaces of the fryers, metal shelf near microwave, knife rack, bread drawer, portable fan, dough trays, lids for dry ingredient bins, and dessert display case have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023

The walls near the 3 bay sink have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2023
